basic_details.job_title: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Jajpur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Medical Officer, Pediatrician and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Jajpur Medical Officer, Pediatrician Notification 2026 has been released for the recruitment of various healthcare posts on a contractual basis. Eligible candidates are invited to attend the walk-in interview scheduled for 23 June 2026 at the designated venue mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: For Medical Officer (Ayush, Collocated), Medical Officer (RBSK), Senior TB Lab. Supervisor (NTEP): Graduate level qualification. For Pediatrician, DEIC, Medical Officer, SNCU, Medical Officer, DEIC: Graduate level qualification.

all_official_links.label: Download Zilla Swasthya Samiti Jajpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization releasing this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being released by Zilla Swasthya Samiti Jajpur. They are conducting a walk-in interview for various posts.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The available posts include Medical Officer (Ayush, Collocated), Medical Officer (RBSK), Senior TB Lab. Supervisor (NTEP), Pediatrician, DEIC, Medical Officer, SNCU, and Medical Officer, DEIC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 23 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification mentioned is graduate level for all the listed posts.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Zilla Swasthya Samiti Jajpur office. Specific timings and venue details should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
